hero.eyebrow: From the Same Intention. Toward Marriage.
hero.sub: No Swiping. No Small Talk. An introduction platform for Muslims serious about marriage.
hero.note: Free during early access · No subscriptions · Delete your account anytime

items: No swipe culture. No ghosting games.

items.label: Members verified before they can connect
Max active conversations — intentional by design

founder.title: Why I built this.
paragraphs: I got married. Then I didn't.
After my marriage ended, I found myself looking for a partner again — this time with more clarity about what I actually wanted, and what I wouldn't compromise on.
I tried the apps. The swiping felt wrong. The matches disappeared. The conversations went nowhere.
What I needed wasn't another algorithm. I needed a place where people showed up with intention — where 'I'm ready to marry' meant something real.
MITAN is that place. It's not perfect. But it's honest. And I think that's enough to start.

steps.title: Build your honest profile
steps.body: Write two reflective essays about who you are and what you're looking for. Upload real photos. Verify your identity with a government ID. No shortcuts.

steps.title: Meet people with intention
steps.body: Browse verified profiles from Muslims around the world. Like someone whose essays resonate with you. When it's mutual, it's a match.

steps.title: Have a real conversation
steps.body: Open up to five conversations at a time. No pressure. Just two people getting to know each other — quietly, with purpose.

who.title: Built for Muslims who are done with casual.
bullets: You've been married before and you know what you're looking for this time.
You're ready to marry but tired of platforms that don't take that seriously.
You want to be known for your values, not just your photos.
You believe a good marriage starts with honest conversation, not a swipe.

cta.title: Ready to begin?
cta.sub: Join thousands of Muslims who chose intention over impulse.

items.a: Yes. Completely free to join, verify, and connect during our early access phase.
Muslim adults who are genuinely ready for marriage. Divorced and widowed members are warmly welcome.
You upload a government-issued ID and a selfie holding it. Our team reviews it manually within 24 hours. Documents are permanently deleted after verification.
Photos tell you what someone looks like. Essays tell you who they are. We believe real compatibility starts with values, not appearance.

items.q: How many conversations can I have?
items.a: Up to five active conversations at a time. Intentional by design.
Your full profile and clear photos are only visible after a mutual match. In discovery, only your first name, age, city, and a blurred photo are shown.

footer.tagline: A quiet introduction, with clear intention.

pwa.installBody: Access faster from your home screen.
